title: Massive Restaurants South Asia Partners is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Massive Restaurants South Asia Partners is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Massive Restaurants South Asia Partners is actively seeking a talented and motivated Guest Relations Manager to join our dynamic team in Pune. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Massive Restaurants South Asia Partners:
Massive Restaurants South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Customer Relations

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Massive Restaurants South Asia Partners!
